examples: Science journalism is the main channel for the popularization of scientific information among the public.
The popularization of digital video recorders has caused advertisers to worry that their commercials will be skipped.
Popularization has in some cases changed the original meaning of emotional intelligence.
He has been awarded the prize for his efforts for popularization of science for peace.
In return, the government has invested heavily in research and in protecting the parks, including through a massive popularization campaign.
